subcodes.first_line: This remembrance is from Our presence unto him who hath been stirred by the wafting of the breezes of his Lord's mercy, the All-Merciful, and hath turned toward the Countenance wherefrom illumination hath shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن تحرک من هبوب اریاح رحمه ربه الرحمن و توجه الی الوجه الذی به اشرقت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @importance of prayer, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
